Headline: #87 87th,  #95 95th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 91st/Burley.
ShortDescription: Eastbound  87 87th,  95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound  #87 87th,  #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 91st/Burley.

#87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Buffalo, 92nd, Baltimore and 91st including the normal route streets.

#95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 91st, Brandon, 92nd, and Buffalo including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near 91st/Burley
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

Northbound buses will operate via 91st, Buffalo, and 92nd including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via 92nd, Buffalo, and 91st.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark,  #152 Addison Temporary Reroute at Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: 22 Clark,  152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark,  #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

 

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #147 Outer DuSable, #151 Sheridan Lake Shore Express Temporary Southbound Reroute near Sheridan/Thorndale
ShortDescription: Southbound 147 Outer DuSable, 151 Sheridan Lake Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted  due to, street blockage near Sheridan/Thorndale.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #147 Outer DuSable, #151 Sheridan Lake Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Sheridan, Thorndale, Broadway, Bryn Mawr and Sheridan due to, street blockage near Sheridan/Thorndale

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
